prerequisites: A Rootly account with access to your Organization Settings (an organization admin role is required to generate API keys).
A Rootly API key generated from Organization Settings > API Keys. The key is sent as a Bearer token on every request to https://api.rootly.com/v1/.
A start date (start_date) marking the earliest point from which to sync incident and related records.

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a Rootly API key supplied in the connector's api_key field. Rootly sends it as an `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` header over HTTPS; requests also use the `application/vnd.api+json` JSON:API media type. Generate the key under Organization dropdown > Organization Settings > API Keys > Generate New API Key. The key inherits a scope (Global, Team, or Personal) chosen at creation, which determines which records the sync can read.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Rootly API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Rootly and open the Organization dropdown > Organization Settings > API Keys, then choose Generate New API Key. Select the appropriate scope (Global for full instance access, Team for team-owned entities, or Personal to inherit your own permissions) so the connector can read the incident data you need. Copy the generated key, as it grants access via the Authorization: Bearer header.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Paste the generated key into the connector's api_key field. This is the only credential the connector requires; it is sent on every request to the Rootly API base (https://api.rootly.com/v1/).

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field to the earliest date from which records should be synced. The connector uses this as the lower bound for the initial extraction.
